Hero.titleLine2: modern interfaces with structured data flow
Hero.description: I develop production-ready web interfaces using Next.js, TypeScript, and Nuxt.js. Experienced in API integration and state management to ensure consistent data flow, optimal performance, and a smooth user experience.

About.title: Why am I a strong fit for your project?
About.description1: I focus on frontend development that is not only visually appealing, but also well-structured. I have worked on API integration, state management, and authentication implementation to ensure applications run reliably and consistently.
About.description2: My approach emphasizes implementation quality: reusable components, clear data flow, and maintainable code. I don’t chase complexity — I deliver efficient and practical solutions.

Contact.title: Let’s build something meaningful
Contact.desc: I’m open to freelance and collaboration opportunities. If you have an idea or project in mind, let’s discuss it.
Contact.subject: Project Discussion
Contact.body: Hi Pande, I’d like to discuss a project with you.
